# 11-Agent System v2.0

> Generated 2026-05-03

## Overview
11-agent Claude workflow with MiniMax M2.7 delegation.
https://github.com/nelsonhuynhs-ship-it/11-agent-system

## Architecture
Phase 1: design-finder
Phase 2: ux-reviewer, code-reviewer, security-auditor, perf-analyzer
Phase 3: master-executor
Phase 4: test-writer, doc-writer, tech-debt-tracker
Phase 5: git-commit

## Key Improvements v2.0
- Two-stage review: spec compliance then code quality
- Fresh context isolation anti-patterns enforced
- Model routing: M2.7 for mechanical, Opus for judgment
- Max 3 review iterations with escalation
- Mandatory final whole-implementation review

## Installation
git clone https://github.com/nelsonhuynhs-ship-it/11-agent-system.git
cd 11-agent-system
./install.sh

## Files
skills/workflow/SKILL.md - main orchestrator
skills/code-reviewer/SKILL.md - two-stage review
skills/master-executor/SKILL.md - final review step
rules/orchestration-protocol.md - escalation rules
reports/11-agent-code-review-report.md
reports/11-agent-execution-report.md
llms.txt - this file
